markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on Q1 content strategy and operational next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Agreement Signing:** Maddy will sign the new agreement after Jo sends a summary email detailing the Q1 plan (10 articles/week, content hub focus).](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**Industry Pages:** GrowthX will complete all industry pages, mirroring the "Law Practice" template. Smith.ai's internal team will then implement separate, deeper layout changes on a subset of pages, starting with legal.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [**Image Generation:** AI-generated images require human review in Figma to ensure quality. To prevent publishing delays, GrowthX will maintain a 30–40 article topic queue for the new design agency (hiring by EOM) to work on.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Testimonial Content:** GrowthX will use transcripts from Smith.ai's 34-video YouTube playlist to add authentic customer voices to content, excluding two partner testimonials.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

## Topics

### Q1 Content Strategy & Agreement

  - [Jo will send a summary email detailing the new agreement's scope, which Maddy will sign.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**Q1 Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [**Output:** 10 editorial articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [**Focus:** Content hub, industry pages, and CD pages.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Strategy Update:** Jo will present an updated strategy next week, informed by analytics, to refine content clusters and improve LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)

### Industry Pages & Overlapping Workstreams

  - [Usman (GrowthX) will return tomorrow to complete the remaining industry pages.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [**Process:** Replicate the "Law Practice" page template across all other industry pages, ensuring no hard-coding of pricing or language.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [**Review:** Jo will stage the pages for Maddy's review before publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [**Overlap:** Smith.ai's internal team (led by Julian) is planning separate, more extensive layout changes for a subset of pages, starting with legal.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)
      - [**Decision:** GrowthX should proceed with its work; the overlapping efforts are manageable.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)
      - [**Support:** GrowthX will provide any additional copy needed for Smith.ai's layout changes.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)

### Image Generation & Design Workflow

  - [**Problem:** Current AI-generated images are repetitive and lack visual diversity.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Solution:** Smith.ai is hiring a design agency, expected to be onboarded by the end of January.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**New Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
      - [**AI + Human Review:** AI-generated images are acceptable only if a designer reviews and cleans them in Figma. Direct-to-site AI images are not permitted.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
      - [**Proactive Queue:** GrowthX will maintain a 30–40 article topic queue to ensure the new agency has a backlog of work, preventing publishing delays.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)

### Testimonial Content Integration

  - [**Asset:** Maddy shared a YouTube playlist with 34 customer testimonial videos.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will use video transcripts to add authentic customer voices to content.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [**Usage Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [**Best Fit:** Industry pages and mid-to-bottom-funnel content.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [**Receptionist Hub:** Integrate verbatim customer stories into the "use case" sections of articles, avoiding direct pitches.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [**Exclusions:** Two partner testimonials (Bo Bryant, Carrie White) are not relevant for customer-facing content. All other videos, regardless of age, remain relevant.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)

### Other Updates

  - [**LLM Visibility:** GrowthX will continue using Smith.ai's existing AI tool. GrowthX can tweak prompts to better balance "AI receptionist" and "VR" messaging if Smith.ai provides new insights.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [**Receptionist Hub:** Val (Smith.ai) implemented the hub within the blog collection, enabling design flexibility.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [**Performance Review:** Jo will send the December performance review async this week.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [Send email summarizing the new agreement's scope for Maddy's signature.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [Stage completed industry pages for Maddy's review.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [Present updated content strategy next week.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
      - [Maintain a 30–40 article topic queue for the new design agency.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
      - [Send the December performance review async this week.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [**Maddy:**](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [Sign the new agreement after reviewing Jo's summary email.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [Provide new messaging insights for LLM prompt tweaks if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/EQckyYhm6sCzdWpdQsko1ispamUKRyCV?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
